sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101861" key="sxhmato/desmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σχημᾰτό-δεσμος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n101861.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bandage</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:18:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.18.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
